command: git diff --check; jq -c . .logs/decisions/architecture.jsonl .logs/decisions/sandbox-objective.jsonl .logs/validation/sandbox-objective.jsonl; go test ./internal/trayapp ./internal/api ./cmd/nanofuse-tray; go build -o bin/nanofuse-tray ./cmd/nanofuse-tray; GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags='-H=windowsgui' -o /tmp/nanofuse-tray.exe ./cmd/nanofuse-tray; bash -n scripts/run-tray-macos.sh scripts/run-tray-windows.ps1; go test ./...; ./scripts/ensure-mage.sh && mage ci; ./scripts/run-tray-macos.sh --start-api --restart --smoke --timeout 10s --api-url http://127.0.0.1:18080; ./scripts/run-tray-macos.sh --start-api --launch-image docker.io/library/alpine:3.20 --timeout 60s --api-url http://127.0.0.1:18080; nanofuse vm ports/exec/stop/delete validation VM; ./scripts/run-tray-macos.sh --start-api --restart --api-url http://127.0.0.1:18080
environment: local macOS 26.5 arm64 host with Apple container compatibility runtime and launchd tray app
notes: Whitespace, JSONL parse, focused tests, macOS tray build, Windows tray cross-build, script syntax, full Go tests, and mage ci passed. Smoke mode required both /health and / and passed against http://127.0.0.1:18080. Headless tray launch created VM 32bf629a-6303-4250-937b-f20e9c12aead named nf-alpine-3-20-4be257 with daemon-allocated port 53868 -> 8080/tcp; vm ports reported reachable and vm exec returned Linux 6.12.28 aarch64. The graceful stop request exceeded the client timeout but the daemon completed the transition to stopped; the VM was then deleted. The actual tray app was restarted via launchd and remained running as PID 56915 while polling /health, /capabilities, /vms, and /images successfully.
